forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog after 3am. Mostly clear, with a low around 47. West wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 7am. Sunny, with a high near 78. Southwest wind 7 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

weather_report:
In the quiet hours of this early morning, Boston settles beneath a layer of patchy fog, lending the streets an ethereal softness as the world slowly stirs to life. The skies, mostly clear, suggest a gentle promise of warmth with a low temperature resting around forty-seven degrees. As dawn approaches, the city will awaken, greeted by the subtle brush of a west wind that adds a refreshing chill to the stillness of the night. It is a moment captured in tranquility, where the lights wink and flicker like distant stars against the backdrop of the muted night.

Tomorrow unveils itself with the soft post-glow of sunlight filtering through an unobstructed sky. Fog will linger momentarily before 7 AM, dissipating as the sun climbs higher, unveiling a vibrant day where temperatures are predicted to reach a near-comfortable seventy-eight degrees. With a brisk southwest wind that flirts between seven and fifteen miles per hour, one can expect invigorating gusts that rustle through trees, creating a lively atmosphere perfect for a stroll through the park or a gathering for coffee in the sunlit streets. Dress casually, perhaps with a light jacket for the early morning chill that will reveal layers of warmth as the day unfolds. Beyond the allure of simple outdoor pleasures, the day invites neighbors and friends to gather, share stories, or simply watch the world flow by.
